title: Parameters<F> tuple with a trailing rest segment
description: mion function.spec.ts 'validate function with rest parameters' — params tuple ending in a rest segment. `Parameters<F>` resolves to `[number, boolean, ...Date[]]`; all trailing slots must satisfy Date.
notes: Every trailing rest slot runs the rest element check (here `Date`); each failing rest entry is reported at its own index, and an Invalid Date in a rest slot is rejected as `expected: 'date'`.
pureType:
type CallSig = (a: number, b: boolean, ...c: Date[]) => Date;
return createValidate<Parameters<CallSig>>();
